alerts.title: Trump threatens strikes on Iran over Hezbollah support amid ceasefire collapse
alerts.summary: Multiple outlets (Le Monde, Washington Post) report Trump administration threats to conduct military strikes against Iran in response to Hezbollah backing, coinciding with active Israeli airstrikes in Lebanon killing 20+ civilians and collapse of ceasefire negotiations. Represents imminent escalation risk during critical US-Iran diplomatic window.

alerts.title: Iran nuclear breakout window narrows to 1-2 weeks with 60% enrichment
alerts.summary: Global metrics confirm Iran uranium enrichment at 60% U-235 with estimated breakout time of 1-2 weeks. Multiple UN and foundation sources (Jerusalem Post, FDF) report leaked MoU text allowing enriched uranium to remain in-country pending dilution. Represents material acceleration of nuclear weapons capability amid failed diplomatic talks.

alerts.title: US-Iran talks paused; Trump threatens tolls on Strait of Hormuz
alerts.summary: WSJ reports Iran pausing talks after Trump threats; France 24 reports Trump threatening economic tolls on Hormuz shipping if talks collapse. Iranian delegation under Ghalibaf arrived in Switzerland but negotiations now stalled. Represents breakdown of negotiation track and escalation of economic coercion.

alerts.title: Three-carrier US posture reinforced; submarine deployed to Persian Gulf
alerts.summary: Assets feed confirms USS Eisenhower, Abraham Lincoln, and Gerald R. Ford all operationally deployed (Red Sea, Arabian Sea, Mediterranean) with supporting destroyers (Carney, Mason, Laboon) and USS Florida submarine in Persian Gulf. Represents unprecedented carrier concentration in theater amid escalating Iran tensions and Houthi maritime threats.
alerts.region: Red Sea / Persian Gulf / Arabian Sea

alerts.title: Houthis claim new Red Sea attacks; shipping ban on Israeli vessels extended
alerts.summary: KTVB and Iran International confirm Yemen-based Houthis claim missile attack on Israel and reiterate ban on Israel-affiliated vessels in Red Sea. Proxy status marked 'Elevated - Multiple Recent Attacks' in global metrics. Coincides with three-carrier US deployment and elevated Hezbollah/PMF activity, creating maritime chokepoint risk.

analysis_note: Critical convergence: Iran nuclear breakout window compressed to 1-2 weeks, US-Iran diplomatic talks stalled amid Trump escalation threats, Israeli-Lebanese ceasefire collapsed with 20+ dead in single strike, three-carrier US task force operationally deployed, and Houthi maritime threats elevated—theater faces imminent multi-vector escalation risk.
